message:
fix: use CompactableStorage interface instead of concrete SQLite type in compact subcommands (dolt-test-9rv6)

All 4 compact modes (--stats, --analyze, --apply, --auto) type-asserted store
to *sqlite.SQLiteStorage, making them fail on Dolt backend. Changed to assert
storage.CompactableStorage interface instead, which SQLite already implements.
Updated all 5 helper function signatures accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
